name: Cabbage Pockets
recipeInstructions:
- Heat the water for the yeast (110°F) and dissolve the package of yeast with 1 tablespoon sugar. Let it become bubbly.
- Mix the dissolved yeast into the melted shortening, sugar, and salt until smooth.
- Gradually add 3 cups flour to form a smooth batter, then stir in 2 eggs and 1 cup warm milk.
- Allow the dough to rise once until doubled in size (about 45 minutes).
- Punch down the dough and let it rise again for another 45 minutes.
- Take half of the dough and roll it out to about 1/4 inch thickness. Cut into squares approximately 4 x 4 inches.
- Fill each square with meat filling, pinch the corners together in the middle, and place seam side down on a greased baking sheet.
- Let rise for an additional 30 minutes, then bake at 350°F for 30-40 minutes.
Brown hamburger with onions until almost done. Add cabbage when nearly ready; drain grease before adding spices like taco seasoning mix or chili powder and garlic powder to taste.
